$comment: Advisory config read by the gardening skill. Nothing in this file is code-enforced. Safety model: gardening only starts on a clean git tree (enforced by /gardening), and changes are reviewed via git diff before commit.

budgets.$comment: Token budgets for memory files. observeMode=true means budgets are measured but not enforced — compression skips until observeMode is false.

progressWindow.$comment: Boot reads only the newest N entries from PROGRESS.md (newest-first format). Rest stays on disk — same lazy-load principle as references/. Makes boot cost constant instead of growing with file size.

sweeps.$comment: Max age before sweep passes archive or delete files.

autonomy.$comment: Pass autonomy levels. 'auto' = runs without confirmation. 'gated' = presents changes and waits for per-pass y/n. Never batch gate confirmations — one pass, one decision. Pass 7 (break-in) is always advisory-only.

graduation.$comment: After this many clean gated runs with no rejections, a pass can be promoted from gated to auto.
